sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72708" key="oi)xhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰχ-ητέον</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">οἴχομαι</etym>) <sense id="n72708.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must gc,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:3:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.42</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
